form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 7 at this track on March 23 over 1400m, 18 len behind Cutie Hard with 54kg at $76.40. The race before that second last of 8 at this track on March 9 over 1400m, 22 len behind Edono Star Wood with 54kg at $126. Can do a lot better than that last run.

form.formComment: At the latest run failed to make an impression; ran last of 7 at this track on March 23 over 1400m, 18 len behind Cutie Hard carrying 54kg at $37.80. The start before that raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 8 at this track on March 9 over 1400m, 23 len behind Edono Star Wood carrying 54kg at $99.50. Nice effort last time so worth following up.
